name: sbuuid

metadata.name: sbuuid
metadata.summary: A package to generate globally unique IDs

documentation:
# SBUUID Package

This package provides a way to generate globally unique ID strings.

## Installation

You can install the package via pip:

```python
pip install sbuuid
```


## Usage

```python
from sbuuid import generate_uuid

print(generate_uuid())  # Outputs a unique ID string
```

functions.name: sbuuid.generate_uuid
documentation: Generate a secure, random, and unique ID.
